win_condition: After each player has served as Sheriff twice (once in 3-player), highest total coins value plus bonuses wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with the most legal goods wins; if still tied, tied player with the most contraband wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Coins + Goods Value
categories.description: Total coin count including value of legal and contraband goods remaining in your stand.

categories.label: King/Queen Legal Goods Bonuses
categories.description: Bonus coins for first/second place in each legal-good category (and Royal Goods equivalency if used).
